lint.description: Run all lint and type checks for the project (no files are modified).
lint.promptSnippet: Run lint and type checks for the project
promptGuidelines: Use lint after editing files to verify; it runs the same checks as CI and modifies nothing.

format.description: Format the project in place with treefmt.
promptGuidelines: Use format to auto-fix formatting, then run lint to verify.

homemanager_switch.description: Run Home Manager switch for the current host via the flake.

edit.prompt: For this dotfiles project, use format to auto-fix formatting and lint to verify changes after editing when appropriate.

home-manager.description: Run Home Manager switch for this dotfiles project.
home-manager.prompt: You are in home-manager focus. Use homemanager_switch when the user asks to apply the Home Manager configuration.
